data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor, Walmart Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points Without This Big Risk
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor and four other stocks have already released their earnings reports, while Walmart, the fifth stock, is scheduled to report in a few weeks. These five companies are approaching buy points, with Taiwan Semiconductor and Walmart leading the way. This information comes from a recent article by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Traders hopeful for Bitcoin to hit $73K soon, facing resistance at weekly trend line, with potential for lower levels.
data.description: Bitcoin traders are showing a preference for a potential short-term return to $73,000, despite encountering resistance at that level. Certain analyses suggest the possibility of even lower price levels in the near future.

data.title: 139th Canton Fair Phase 2 Introduces New Product Zones, Reflecting Evolving Lifestyle Trends
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on April 25, 2026, the latest edition of the 139th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) has unveiled nine new product zones. In Phase 2 alone, four new zones have been introduced, emphasizing quality living and focusing on sustainable materials, refined craftsmanship, and culturally inspired modern living trends. This expansion aims to cater to the evolving consumer demands and trends in the market.

data.title: Best Online Contact Lenses (2026): EZContacts Highlighted for Fast Shipping and Prescription Verification by Expert Consumers
data.description: A company called EZContacts has been acknowledged by Expert Consumers for its strong track record in providing top-notch online contact lens purchasing experiences. The evaluation specifically focuses on how EZContacts effectively handles different aspects of the process, such as prescription verification. This recognition comes amidst a surge in online contact lens sales, with the industry experiencing significant growth in recent years. The acknowledgment of EZContacts' performance underscores the company's leadership in the competitive online contact lens market.

data.title: Wine industry hit by declining sales and widespread fraud. "Wine and fraud hand in hand," says expert.
data.description: The complex supply chain of the industry has always been a magnet for fraudsters and swindlers. According to an expert, there is a strong association between wine and fraudulent activities.

data.title: Brazil cracks down on 27 prediction platforms, such as Kalshi and Polymarket, for violating new gambling regulations.
data.description: In Brazil, a total of 27 prediction market platforms, such as Kalshi and Polymarket, have been shut down due to new regulations that now categorize numerous contracts under gambling activities.

data.title: Exciting discovery: iCAUR reveals new species, promising limitless boundaries and travel opportunities.
data.description: A significant increase in COVID-19 cases has been reported in the country, with a total of 10,000 new cases confirmed in the last 24 hours. This surge in infections has brought the total number of active cases to 50,000, placing immense pressure on the healthcare system. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 500, highlighting the severity of the situation. The government has urged the public to adhere to safety guidelines and precautions to curb the spread of the virus. The vaccination drive is also being accelerated to achieve herd immunity and combat the rising number of cases.

data.title: Paul Sztorc plans August launch of eCash Bitcoin hard fork with drivechains; sparks debate over Satoshi's coins.
data.description: In an upcoming development in the cryptocurrency world, Bitcoin developer Paul Sztorc has revealed plans for an eCash hard fork scheduled for August. This upgrade will see the incorporation of drivechains, bringing about a wave of excitement and debate within the community. Additionally, there is growing controversy surrounding the ownership and movement of Satoshi's coins during this transition. With the hard fork looming in August, stakeholders and enthusiasts are eagerly anticipating the changes ahead.

data.title: US halts $344M in crypto linked to Iran's IRGC, Hizballah as part of sanctions targeting Tehran's financial networks.
data.description: The US Treasury has blocked a total of $344 million held in cryptocurrency wallets connected to Iran, specifically linked to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) and Hizballah. This action is part of a larger initiative aimed at sanctioning Tehran's financial systems.

data.title: From Next-Generation Mobility to Global Expansion: iCAUR Demonstrated Its Vision at Beijing Auto Show 2026
data.description: During the Beijing Auto Show in April 2026, iCAUR showcased two significant features, marking a pivotal moment for the brand. The event, which commenced on April 24, attracted a large audience and generated significant buzz within the automotive industry. The unveiling of these two highlights at the showcase demonstrates iCAUR's commitment to innovation and advancement in the ever-evolving automotive sector. This event served as a platform for iCAUR to make a lasting impression and stand out among competitors, further solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: XRP potentially to surge 30% with 35M tokens withdrawn from exchanges in a day, hinting at May rally.
data.description: A surge in XRP outflow has been observed prior to short-term price increases, indicating a possible uptrend in May if this pattern continues.

data.title: Leading a New Era of Family Mobility! CHERY TIGGO V, the 3-in-1 Family Vehicle, Debuts at AutoChina2026
data.description: In Beijing yesterday, the 18th AutoChina2026 began with CHERY brand unveiling the TIGGO V, the inaugural transformable multi-purpose family SUV in the TIGGO lineup. This innovative model, which marks a significant milestone for CHERY, attracted attention for its versatility and unique features. The launch of the TIGGO V at the event signifies a strategic move by CHERY to expand its product range and cater to the growing demands of consumers seeking multifunctional vehicles. With this introduction, CHERY aims to capitalize on the lucrative SUV segment, where demand is robust. The TIGGO V's debut at the AutoChina2026 underscores CHERY's commitment to innovation and staying ahead in the competitive automotive market. This unveiling is expected to elevate CHERY's brand presence and drive sales, positioning the company for further growth in the industry.

data.title: Upgraded Buyer Services at 139th Canton Fair Boost Efficiency and Support Long‑Term Global Partnerships
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the 139th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) commenced on April 25, 2026, and is scheduled to run until May 5, featuring three phases of exhibitions. Attendees noted a distinctive increase in energy from previous editions as soon as they arrived. Noteworthy is a Saudi buyer's enthusiastic reaction upon experiencing...

data.title: CORZ to release Q1 2026 earnings on May 6 amid shift to AI infrastructure. Details on earnings call and investor context available on webcast.
data.description: Core Scientific is set to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on May 6 as the company shifts its focus to AI infrastructure. The earnings release will include important insights for investors and stakeholders. The announcement will be made during a webcast where key details about the company's performance and strategic direction will be discussed. This move comes as Core Scientific looks to capitalize on the growing demand for AI technologies. Stay tuned for updates on the earnings report and the company's future plans.

data.title: Former US president hosts event for TRUMP memecoin holders as token price falls below $3, sparking ethical worries.
data.description: Former President Donald Trump has invited TRUMP memecoin holders to Mar-a-Lago amid a decline in the token's value. This move has sparked ethical debates and heightened market instability. The value of TRUMP memecoin has faced challenges, prompting concerns about its future. Trump's decision to engage with holders of the struggling cryptocurrency has added to the overall uncertainty surrounding the market.

data.title: Aurelion invests $48M in XAUE gold protocol, offering yield on tokenized gold. Aims to revolutionize gold as an asset.
data.description: Aurelion has invested 10,000 XAU₮, which is approximately $48 million, into XAUE, a fresh DeFi protocol providing yields on gold that has been tokenized. The model is exclusively for institutional investors and is geared towards revolutionizing how gold is perceived as an asset.

data.title: Quantum computer cracks 15-bit ECC key, sparking Bitcoin concerns over 256-bit security as quantum technology progresses.
data.description: A significant breakthrough occurred in the field of quantum computing as a 15-bit ECC key was successfully cracked. This has sparked concerns about the security of Bitcoin, which currently relies on 256-bit cryptography. The advancement in quantum capabilities indicates a potential vulnerability in the encryption methods used in cryptocurrencies and other secure systems. This development underscores the need for increased research and possibly a revision of encryption techniques to withstand the evolving power of quantum computers.

data.title: OpenAI debuts Codex-powered agents for ChatGPT, streamlining tasks for businesses. Early access available on specific plans until May 6, 2026.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced workspace agents for ChatGPT, designed to streamline business processes. These agents are now accessible for research purposes on specific plans until May 6, 2026. Explore further for additional details.

data.title: PAC reallocates $1.75M in ad support for Texas AG Paxton. Shift in crypto-funded political ads amid midterms.
data.description: A political action committee known as Fellowship PAC has decided to pull back a significant $1.75 million advertisement purchase supporting Paxton in the Texas Senate race. This move raises questions about the future of cryptocurrency-supported political funding as the midterms approach.
Stephen I Miran has reported recent stock transactions.
